'''New Agamar''' was a high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. At least [[Dondo Foth|one]] native was enlisted in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic military]] by the [[19 BBY/Legends|time of]] the late [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="JT">''[[Jedi Trial]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
New Agamar is first and solely mentioned in ''[[Jedi Trial]]'', a novel by [[David Sherman]] and [[Dan Cragg]], in a short character profile in the latter part of the novel. Later information on its galactic location and affiliation is given in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{Mo}}
